posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I’m excited to share that you can now integrate Cin7 Omni with monday using the Data Importer monday app for free.

A few things you can do with Cin7 Omni using Data Importer

  • Bulk import Sales Orders, Purchase Orders, Contacts etc.
  • Import various fields for the above objects
  • Schedule imports to keep your monday board in sync when new objects are added to Cin7 Omni

Cin7 Omni Data Importer2078×1096 136 KB

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jamespatten

That sounds like a great way to streamline Cin7 Omni data into Monday.com for better workflow automation! Here’s how I’d enhance this integration to make it even more powerful

Setting up scheduled imports ensures that Sales Orders, Purchase Orders, and Contacts always stay up to date in Monday.com. No manual data entry needed

We can configure the integration to import specific fields that match your team’s workflow, ensuring relevant data is always available.

Once data is imported, we can trigger automations—like task assignments, notifications, or status updates—so your team takes action instantly.
